title: Elementals - Origins Addon
description: A lightweight elemental addon for Origins.
body:
Elementals

An elemental addon for the Origins mod, allowing you to choose between the four main elements titled Anemo, Geo, Hydro and Pyro. Designed to be lightweight and balanced. Greatly inspired by the Aspects mod.

Requires Fabric API and Origins.


ANEMO
  • + Increased Movement Speed
  • + Decreased Fall Damage
  • - 2 Less Hearts
  • - Increased Wither Damage

GEO
  • + 4 Additional Amor Points
  • + Increased Digging Speed
  • - Increased Explosion Damage
  • - Decreased Movement Speed

HYDRO
  • + Water Breathing
  • + Increased Movement Speed in Water
  • - Increased Fire Damage
  • - Deal Less Damage In Hot Biomes

PYRO
  • + Lava Vision
  • + FIre Immunity
  • - Take Water Damage
  • - Carnivore
